name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 29 Jul 2020
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Release Version:","bold":true},{"text":" 6.113"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Minor Improvements","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Neto's Xero integration has been updated to allow more control over Cost of Goods Sold. COGS journals can now be batched by date invoiced or date completed."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Bug Fixes","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue in Neto POS where image thumbnails weren't updated after being changed in the control panel."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue with the eBay integration where automated revisions caused a retail price invalid error when the RRP field is blank."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]
